package rulefixtures

// scenario for range_over_string_by_index: `for i := 0; i < len(s); i++ { c := s[i] }` on strings that should iterate runes
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule629PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario629Positive(records []Rule629PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
